text: Aaj team meeting mein Boss ne sabke samne meri bezatti ki aur layoff ki dhamki di, tab se mera dimaag ekdum sunn pad gaya hai. Main bas roye ja raha hoon aur laptop band karke baitha hoon, na khane ka hosh hai na aage kya karna hai kuch samajh aa raha. Itna bura lag raha hai ki lagta hai sab kuch khatam ho gaya, bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai.

Meeting mein Boss ke chillaane ke baad se main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon, dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Papa ne kisan hokar apni sari jama-pungi meri engineering mein laga di thi aur ab is humiliation ne mujhe poori tarah tod diya hai. Main is waqt koi career backup ya EMI ke baare mein soch hi nahi pa rahi, bas rone ka mann kar raha hai.

Boss ne sabke samne nikalne ki baat kahi toh mera dil itni buri tarah toot gaya ki bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi. Startup ki ye job meri identity thi, par ab is bezatti ne mujhe poori tarah emotional flooding ka shikar bana diya hai. Dimaag mein bas wahi taane goonj rahe hain aur main bas sunn hokar leti hoon, aage ka kuch sujhh nahi raha.

Aaj ki meeting ke baad se main itna ghut raha hoon ki saans lena bhi bojh lag raha hai, dimaag mein bas wahi 'sarkari naukri na milne ka failure' wali baatein chal rahi hain. Ghar ki EMI aur kirana shop ka karz kaise chukega ye baad ki baat hai, pehle ye jo rona ruk nahi raha usne mujhe duba diya hai. Is waqt main koi solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bacha, bas lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh hoon.

Boss ne team ke samne mere kaam ko kachra bol diya aur tabhi se main bas sunn hokar baitha hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas. MNC ki ye job mere parivaar ki 'izzat' thi, par ab is humiliation ne mujhe itna flood kar diya hai ki main laptop kholne ki soch bhi nahi sakta. Main bas ek loop mein fasa hoon jahan sirf dard aur nakami mehsus ho rahi hai, baki sab dhundhla gaya hai.
